nl_query: How many DEKs were created per KEK?
failed_sql:
SELECT key_encryption_key_id, COUNT(*) AS dek_count
FROM   data_encryption_key
GROUP BY key_encryption_key_id
ORDER BY dek_count DESC
LIMIT  500;
